summary: Send a response from a Generic Tool Item and then update the item status
description:
Send a response from a generic tool item and then update that item. For more information on Generic Tool and Correspondence Tool endpoints, 
see [Working with the Correspondence Tool](/documentation/tutorial-correspondence).

parameters.name: generic_tool_item_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Generic Tool Item

parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Generic Tool

private.description: If this property is set to true, the generic tool item is private. If this property is set to false, the generic tool item is not private.

skip_emails.description: If true creating and updating the item will not send emails to the users on the item.

schedule_impact.description: The schedule impact status for the generic tool item.

distribution_member_ids.description: An array of distribution member identifiers for the generic tool item.

assignee_ids.description: An array of assignee identifiers for the generic tool item.
